examples: With his first wife and two children he left Vermont by covered wagon in 1855 to homestead in Kansas.
He followed it until he was in sight of the homestead.
That first afternoon, Jarrett gave us a tour of the homestead.
And Michelle had a chance to see that firsthand at the Homestead race last year.
Now, Congress is considering a New Homestead Act that would attempt to repopulate dying towns.
